testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.sub: Hear directly from our wonderful clients about their salon experience.

reviews.name: Eleanor Vance
reviews.text: The most relaxing and professional salon experience I've ever had. My hair feels absolutely incredible and soft!

reviews.name: Sophia Martinez
reviews.text: Perfect facials! My skin was glowing for weeks. The aesthetic here is so calming and luxurious.

reviews.name: Amira Yusuf
reviews.text: An amazing bridal makeup experience. The artists were so intuitive about what works best with my features.

gallery.title: Our Masterpieces

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.sub: Get answers to common queries about our premium treatments and booking.

items.q: What products do you use for hair styling and treatments?
items.a: We exclusively use premium, professional, and organic-infused styling lines to ensure multidimensional glow and ultimate hair health.

items.q: Do I need to book a free consultation before my treatment?
items.a: While it is not mandatory, we highly recommend booking a complimentary 15-minute consultation to personalize your treatment plan.

items.q: Do you offer tailored bridal packages?
items.a: Yes! We offer fully personalized bridal packages that include trials, skincare prep, hair, and makeup styling for your special day.

cta.title: Ready to Experience True Luxury?
cta.sub: Reach out via WhatsApp or Instagram to book your premium beauty session today.

footer.desc: The pinnacle of luxury hair, skincare, and bridal expertise. Redefine your beauty.
